mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no significant negative correlation with rate levels.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative equity returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the unemployment rise signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving corporate revenue growth and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive movements in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 20d returns in > 55% of cases, or interaction Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in the index of industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and output, which supports corporate earnings and generates positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth signals yield negative 60d returns during mid-cycle expansion phases, or Rank IC drops below 0.03 in this regime.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price index levels above 305 indicate persistent inflationary pressures, prompting expectations of tighter monetary policy and generating negative short-term equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL levels above 305 are followed by positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances, or Rank IC remains negative.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month nonfarm payrolls additions exceeding 200,000 signal robust labor market expansion, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Payrolls exceeding 200k are followed by negative 20d returns in > 55% of cases, or signal loses predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts combined with falling federal funds rates reflect improved financing conditions for real estate investment, stimulating downstream economic activity and positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising HOUST and falling FEDFUNDS fails to predict positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases during easing cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter real GDP growth exceeding 2.0% confirms strong macroeconomic expansion, reinforcing earnings forecasts and generating positive equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: GDP growth above 2.0% is followed by negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances during late-cycle expansion, or Rank IC < 0.03.
